name: Gingered Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Zucchini, cut in half lengthwise, then sliced
2 cups Fresh or frozen corn kernels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 15 minutes
2. Cooking time: 50 minutes
3. In a large pot, sauté the onion, celery, green pepper, garlic, and ginger root in the 1/2 cup water for 5 minutes.
4. Add the 4 cups of additional water, tomato sauce, potatoes, and seasonings to the pot. Cook over low heat for 30 minutes.
5. Add the zucchini and corn to the pot. Continue cooking an additional 15 minutes, or until all vegetables are tender.
